eq_faultdescription: Arc becomes unstable after 10–15 minutes of welding. Weld pool shows excessive spatter and the arc extinguishes intermittently. Problem occurs only with 1.0 mm solid wire, G3Si1, mixed gas (82% Ar / 18% CO₂). Error code E-07 appears on display before shutdown.
eq_notes: Demo: Open ticket, high priority, under warranty. Shows 'In Review' status with warranty badge.

eq_faultdescription: Machine shuts down after 5 minutes with OVERHEAT indicator. Fan appears to be running normally. Ambient temperature is 22°C. Production is stopped — this machine is the only one available for this critical component run. Customer requesting urgent escalation.
eq_notes: Demo: Critical / production stopped. Parts ordered (fan assembly + thermal sensor). Extended warranty.

eq_faultdescription: After firmware update to v1.3.0, the AC balance control no longer saves between sessions. Every time the machine is powered on, AC balance resets to 50%. Customer has confirmed issue on two separate units with the same firmware version.
eq_notes: Demo: Firmware bug, awaiting customer to test hotfix patch v1.3.1. Active warranty.

eq_faultdescription: Wire feed motor making grinding noise and inconsistent wire speed (measured 4.2–6.8 m/min instead of stable 5.5 m/min set value). Drive rolls and liner recently replaced. Issue likely worn motor or gearbox. Out-of-warranty repair requested.
eq_notes: Demo: Resolved ticket, out of warranty. Motor replaced, repair invoice issued. Good for showing closed-loop flow.
